markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If New York Y wins the Minnesota vs New York Y professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 4, 2026 at 1:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Minnesota vs New York Y professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 4, 2026 at 1:35 PM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
markets.title: Minnesota vs New York Y Winner?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Eberechi Eze records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the England vs Congo DR professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the England vs Congo DR professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Eberechi Eze: 1+ goals

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Eberechi Eze records the first goal for England during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the England vs Congo DR professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the England vs Congo DR professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. If the team's first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored for that team.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Oswaldo Cabrera records 3+ hits in the Detroit vs New York Y professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026 at 1:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Oswaldo Cabrera is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Oswaldo Cabrera starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Oswaldo Cabrera is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Oswaldo Cabrera is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Oswaldo Cabrera: 3+ hits?

markets.rules_primary: If Austin Wells records 2+ hits in the Detroit vs New York Y professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 1, 2026 at 1:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Austin Wells is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Austin Wells starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Austin Wells is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Austin Wells is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
